description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with four straight legs, supporting a computer workstation setup. On the desktop, there is a large monitor, a computer tower, a keyboard, a mouse on a red mousepad, and a small picture frame. The computer tower is positioned to the left of the monitor, while the mouse and mousepad are on the right. The monitor is centrally placed, with cables visibly connecting it to the computer tower. The desk surface is spacious and uncluttered, with all items neatly arranged. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for an office or home workspace.
description: A wooden desk with a computer workstation setup, including a monitor, tower, keyboard, mouse, and picture frame. The design is simple, functional, and organized.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the desk and the computer tower's position on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full workstation setup, with the monitor, computer tower, keyboard, mouse, and picture frame all visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the monitor's back, the cable arrangement, and the mousepad on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the monitor, computer tower, and visible cables, with the picture frame and mousepad on the left.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the monitor, keyboard, and mouse accessible, with the computer tower on the left and the picture frame on the right.
